name: Liberty Live Holdings, Inc.
business: Liberty Live Holdings, Inc. is a holding company that beneficially owns approximately 69.6 million shares of Live Nation common stock and owns Quint, a provider of premium sports and entertainment experiences. Through Quint, the company sells official ticket-inclusive hospitality and experiential packages to individual consumers and corporate clients. The company also has interests in certain private assets and corporate cash and debt obligations.

exposures.sentence: Live Nation believes its global footprint is one of the world's largest music advertising networks for corporate brands and includes one of the world's leading ecommerce websites.

Live Nation's Sponsorship & Advertising segment employs a sales force that creates and maintains relationships with sponsors through a combination of strategic, international, national and local opportunities that allow businesses to reach customers through Live Nation's concert, festival, venue and ticketing assets, including advertising on Live Nation's websites.
Quint is a leading global provider of premium sports and entertainment experiences.

The degradation, failure or misuse of our information systems could cause a disruption of services or improper loss, use and disclosure of personal data or other confidential information, resulting in increased costs, liabilities or loss of revenue.
